sampled_beliefs.content_preview: Germans are hard workers.
People who wear glasses are more intelligent.
People from rural areas are poorly educated.
Nail polish is for girls.
Men do not show emotions.
Jewish people are stingy.
Depression is not really a disease, people with so-called depression are just lazy.
Dark girls are not beautiful.
Men are more suited for studying science and engineering.
India has poor hygiene conditions.
Homosexuality is closely linked to AIDS.
South Korean women get a lot of plastic surgery.
Socialism values collective interests above individual interests.
A righteous girl preserves herself for her husband.
Russians are very cold and unemotional.
Older people drive slowly, often causing traffic jams.
The government has employed people in secret to assassinate others
There are ongoing, hidden efforts to marginalize, control, or destroy certain groups of people through the use of political policies
Movies and TV shows featuring aliens are a way of preparing the population for the news that aliens are real and have visited earth
Certain significant world events have been the result of the activity of a small group who secretly manipulate world politics
Technology with mind-control capacities exists and is currently being used on people without their knowledge
Progress toward a cure for cancer, AIDS, and other diseases is deliberately being hindered
Drugs are deliberately supplied to certain communities in order to marginalize or destroy them
Government funded scientists manipulate evidence in order to support existing government policy
Ironic' study finds more CO2 has slightly cooled the planet
there is no relationship between temperature and carbon dioxide emissions by Â­humans[...]
Harvard study finds that wind turbines create MORE global warming than the fossil fuels they eliminate
Nevertheless over the last decade, daily record high temperatures occurred twice as often as record lows.
the Great Barrier Reef is in fine fettle
Humans are too insignificant to affect global climate.
Since 1965, more parts of the U.S. have seen a decrease in flooding than have seen an increase.
Renewables can't provide baseload power
Satellite transmissions are extremely small and irrelevant.
Melania Trump: Women First, Only
Meet James Robart, the judge who approved Trump's immigration ban
White Nationalist sympathizer Friedman confirmed as U.S. ambassador to Israel.
In age of Obama, Trump is the new tabloid darling.
